element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Lemmings automatically walk and fall; player learns to observe pathfinding before intervening
Vertical obstacle navigation; climbers overcome height barriers but fail on overhangs
Height safety; prevents fall damage but requires strategic placement timing
Traffic control; creates permanent obstacles that reverse lemming direction
Active terrain creation; 12-step stairways with multiple failure conditions (head collision, depletion, solid obstruction)
Horizontal obstacle breakthrough; cannot penetrate steel barriers
Diagonal descent through terrain; steel barriers block progress
Direct downward excavation; steel barrier limitation forces alternate routing
Destructive detonation after 5-second timer; self-eliminates user and clears destructible landscape; high failure consequence
Lethal hazards requiring skill assignment; pools of lava and booby traps necessitate routing strategies
Level timer detonates all lemmings if expired; creates pressure for efficient skill sequencing
Primary objective marker; guides overall level strategy from beginning

typical_relief_triggers: Successful lemming group passage through obstacle
Assignment of correct skill to avert lemming death
Time remaining buffer before level timeout
typical_tension_triggers: Lemmings approaching lethal drop without assigned floater
Limited skill uses remaining while obstacles persist
Lemming falling into trap or lava pool
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Real-time skill assignment under time pressure creates oscillating tension; player must pause to strategize but execution occurs in continuous flow; NES port noted for sluggish reactions compared to Amiga original, reducing tension intensity

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-focused; introduces basic lemming behavior and foundational skills (Climber, Floater, Blocker); safe contexts with clear obstacle patterns
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Skill complexity expansion; introduces horizontal and diagonal tunneling (Basher, Miner, Digger); combined obstacle scenarios requiring multi-step solutions
difficulty_curve.late_game: Precision and timing; Bomber skill introduction with high failure consequence; constrained skill quantities forcing critical decision-making
notable_spikes: First appearance of Bomber skill (high self-elimination risk)
Levels combining multiple hazard types (lava, traps, extreme heights)
Constraints on high-utility skills with complex level geometry

notable_level_patterns.description: Lemmings traverse left-to-right or right-to-left path with sequential hazards requiring specific skill assignments in order; teaches skill hierarchy
Lemmings must descend multiple levels safely using Floaters or Diggers; emphasized in mid-game after introduction of fall mechanics
Blocked horizontal passage requires Basher/Miner skills to tunnel through obstacles; tests spatial reasoning about destructible vs. indestructible surfaces
Strategically placed Blocker lemmings reverse direction of others to route them toward exit; teaches indirect lemming control
Bomber skill placement to clear landscape obstacles while timing detonation to avoid excessive lemming loss; introduces risk-reward tension
